description: Adaptive seed growth model. Uses Shannon entropy as complexity cost to switch between explore (branching) and expand (preserving) modes. The branches of the tree.

dual_mode_growth.description: Every growth step evaluates complexity cost. High energy relative to cost → explore (branch out). Low energy → expand (preserve structure).

expand.description: Deterministic proportional scaling. Preserves existing structure exactly.
expand.rosetta_analog: Home base — staying within known shapes and families

explore.description: Adaptive growth with mutation. New directions, new proportions, new structure.
explore.rosetta_analog: Discovery — following curiosity into new shapes and families

dual_mode_growth.rosetta_bridge: expand mode IS the entity resting at home base. explore mode IS the entity following discovery paths.

complexity_cost.description: Shannon entropy measures how 'spread out' the seed is. Maximum entropy = uniform distribution. Low entropy = concentrated. The GAP between max and actual entropy IS the complexity cost.

variables.H_max: log2(N) where N = vertex count = log2(6) ≈ 2.585

interpretation.low_complexity: Seed is spread evenly — easy to maintain, cheap to grow
interpretation.high_complexity: Seed is concentrated — expensive structure, costly to maintain

complexity_cost.rosetta_link: Shannon entropy IS information theory IS FAMILY.F03 (Information)

branching_threshold.description: The energy required to branch (explore) scales with complexity. More complex seeds need more energy to explore further.
branching_threshold.rosetta_link: This IS the merge gate — you need enough energy (physics allows it) to cross into a new shape

dynamic_sigma.description: Sharpness of growth adapts to local conditions. High sigma = focused growth. Low sigma = diffuse exploration.
dynamic_sigma.rosetta_analog: Sensor sensitivity — sharp sensors (FAMILY.F14) vs broad awareness (FAMILY.F12)

saturation.description: Prevents any single vertex from dominating. Caps amplitude at saturation threshold.
saturation.rosetta_analog: Conservation law — no single family can monopolize an entity's identity

resonance.description: Past shells influence current growth. Memory of structure.
resonance.rosetta_analog: FAMILY.F01 (Resonance) — past patterns shape present growth

pruning.description: Shed directions that cost more energy than they contribute.
pruning.rosetta_analog: Blocked merges — physics gates that prevent wasteful combinations

growth_metrics.entropy: Shannon entropy of amplitude distribution — measures diversity
growth_metrics.symmetry: Variance of amplitudes — low variance = high symmetry
